AuthClass.note: Derived from the CREATED access-control / KeyInfo, never echoed from the request.

KeySpec.attestationChallenge: bytes? (bound at generation; there is no call-time challenge)

AccessControlPolicy.authValiditySeconds: int? (null or 0 = per-use auth; > 0 = time window)

primitives.generateKey: (KeySpec) -> (KeyHandle, SecurityTierReport). FAILS unavailableTier below floor unless allowDowngrade:true; existing alias FAILS keyAlreadyExists.
primitives.sign: (KeyHandle, digest[32], SignOptions?) -> Signature. Async; host-UI biometric callback; a second concurrent auth-gated sign is rejected.
primitives.getAttestation: (KeyHandle) -> AttestationResult. No call-time challenge (bound at generateKey).
primitives.getSecurityTier: (KeyHandle) -> SecurityTierReport. On an invalidated key returns invalidated==true (no throw).
